description: Documents.tsx drawer renders CollaborativeEditor instead of TextEditor when editing an in-app document
CollaborativeEditor receives documentId, tenantId, userId, userName from drawer and connects to Hocuspocus room
Content format detection: detect whether block_data is BlockNote JSON (array with props) or ProseMirror JSON (object with type:'doc')
BlockNote-to-ProseMirror conversion function: paragraph blocks
BlockNote-to-ProseMirror conversion function: heading blocks with level prop
BlockNote-to-ProseMirror conversion function: bulletListItem and numberedListItem blocks
BlockNote-to-ProseMirror conversion function: inline content (text with styles, links, mentions)
BlockNote-to-ProseMirror conversion function: checkListItem, codeBlock, blockquote, table blocks
On first connection to a Y.js room with no state, initialize from block_data (converting from BlockNote format if needed)
Manual Save button in drawer footer triggers syncCollabSnapshot() when in collaborative mode
On drawer close, trigger a best-effort snapshot to persist content
Graceful fallback: detect Hocuspocus unreachable (3s timeout) and switch to single-user Tiptap editor with manual save
Fallback mode uses DocumentEditor (single-user Tiptap) with manual save via updateBlockContent()
Fallback mode shows status indicator: 'Offline — manual save mode'
Presence bar and collaboration cursors work in drawer context (existing CollaborativeEditor features)
New document creation in drawer: create document record + block_content, then open CollaborativeEditor in new room
Read-only view mode in drawer: render content without editing capabilities
Document name editing in drawer header still works with new editor
Unsaved changes warning on drawer close (when in fallback mode with pending changes)
After format conversion from BlockNote to ProseMirror, persist the converted format back to document_block_content
